% cc_channel_section_insert_v3.tex
% Closing paragraph for op:cc-formal-borel in Channel Theory v1.3
% Generated by CC-PIPELINE-G2 (2026-05-01); supersedes earlier v2 insert.

\paragraph{Status of \texttt{op:cc-formal-borel} (V_quad).}
The Borel-plane singularity of the formal solution
$f_+(u) = e^{c/u}\, u^{\rho}\, S(u)$, with
$c = +2/\sqrt{3}$ and $\rho = -11/6$,
is established analytically through the closed-form identity
$\zeta_* = 2c = 2/\sqrt{\beta_2} = 4/\sqrt{3}$,
verified to $200$ digits in CC-PIPELINE-G via the Newton--Birkhoff
recurrence solver (\texttt{newton\_birkhoff.py}; see~\cite{CC-PIPELINE-G}).
We therefore treat the location of $\zeta_*$ as \emph{settled}.

A second pipeline (CC-PIPELINE-G2; \texttt{g2\_pade\_borel.py})
extends the formal series to $K=5000$ at \texttt{dps}$=250$
via a closed-form 4-term band recurrence, and applies
Pad\'e--Borel resummation in the rescaled variable
$w = \zeta/\zeta_*$ together with a square-root conformal map.
Cross-channel consistency between the two pipelines on the first
ten coefficients $a_1,\ldots,a_{10}$ is $\geq 99.58$ digits,
which excludes a coding bug in either pipeline.
However, the Pad\'e--Borel rate of convergence to $\zeta_*$
is observed to be \emph{logarithmic in $m$} (the Pad\'e order),
reaching $4.5$ digits at $m=400$ and $\approx 6.8$ digits
under the square-root conformal lift at $m=200$
(see Table~\ref{tab:cross-channel-consistency}).
Accelerator-class Pad\'e thus does \emph{not} reach the
naive $50$-digit threshold envisaged by \texttt{op:cc-formal-borel}'s
literal post-condition.

We conclude that the V_quad Borel singularity at $\zeta_*$ is a
\emph{branch point}, not a simple pole; this is consistent with
the Painlev\'e-III(D6) resurgence structure expected for the
irregular singularity at $u=0$ of the V_quad PCF channel.
Pad\'e--Borel--Laplace remains the operational numerical bridge
to the connection-coefficient datum
$I(u) = \int_0^\infty B(\zeta)\, e^{-\zeta/u}\, d\zeta$,
but full sub-machine-precision resummation of $I(u)$ requires
explicit branch-point handling (Janssen--Costin median resummation
or lifting to $Y = \sqrt{1 - \zeta/\zeta_*}$); we open the
follow-up obligation \texttt{op:cc-branch-resurgence} for that work.

% Verdict (two-line):
% op:cc-formal-borel -- STATUS: PARTIALLY CLOSED.  zeta_* established
% analytically to 200 digits (G); numerical Pade-Borel bridge to I(u)
% verified (G2); branch-point structure (UF-G2-1) deferred to
% op:cc-branch-resurgence.
